description: quarter phase continuation on retained axis
support_rule: Q advances the native quarter-phase coordinate on one retained axis.

description: balanced denominator-pair refinement on retained axis
support_rule: B refines the native balanced denominator pair on one retained axis; germ c is derived from theta and q.

description: host lift / latch / axis birth boundary event
support_rule: L freezes a boundary value, creates the next retained axis, and appends contact/latch memory.

description: derived overlap-pair event from retained native supports
support_rule: O is the derived overlap-pair read/write event extracted from native retained axes and their shared edge support.
R is a terminal projection/read event; it must not affect retained dynamics.
